queries.q: Design an A/B test for the new checkout button placement
We have a hypothesis about onboarding emails; spec the experiment with variants, sample size, and duration
How many users per variant do we need to detect a 2 percent lift in conversion, and how long should we run it?
queries.notes: Intent-only phrasing centered on sample size and duration

queries.q: Stakeholders want data before we roll out the redesign; set up a controlled test plan
Write the experiment plan for testing free shipping thresholds, including guardrail metrics and success criteria
Define control and treatment, traffic allocation, and exclusions for the search ranking test
Help me design a rigorous experiment to validate the assumption we already framed about trial-to-paid conversion
Plan the A/B test so we do not call it early on noise: significance level, power, and stopping rules
Our hypothesis doc is approved; turn it into a runnable test design before engineering builds the variants
Set up an experiment comparing two paywall designs with a single primary metric
Help me articulate what we actually believe about churn before we design any test
queries.notes: The claim itself is not articulated yet; framing it is the partner's job

queries.q: We have not framed what to test yet; write the We believe X for Y will Z claim for the referral idea
queries.notes: Hypothesis statement comes before experiment design

queries.q: Turn the team's competing assumptions about power users into one falsifiable statement with success metrics
queries.notes: Aligning on the assumption, not designing the test

queries.q: The experiment finished yesterday; analyze whether the treatment won
Spec the event tracking we need before any experiment can be measured
Draft a survey to gather user opinions on the new dashboard and analyze the responses
queries.notes: Gathering opinions, not running a controlled test

queries.q: Define the dashboard requirements for our growth metrics
My Docker container exits with code 137; help me debug it
Write a SQL query for daily active users by platform
Plan a three day hiking itinerary in the Dolomites
